query:
-- First bookings this week (agents whose FIRST booking was created this week)
SELECT u.name AS agentName, COUNT(b2.id) AS priorBookings, MIN(b.createdAt) AS firstBookingDate
FROM bookings b
JOIN users u ON u.id = b.agentId
LEFT JOIN bookings b2 ON b2.agentId = b.agentId AND b2.createdAt < DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL ((DAYOFWEEK(NOW()) + 5) % 7) DAY, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
WHERE b.createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL ((DAYOFWEEK(NOW()) + 5) % 7) DAY, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')
GROUP BY b.agentId, u.name
HAVING priorBookings = 0
LIMIT 10;

-- Community post categories available
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM community_posts WHERE createdAt >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL ((DAYOFWEEK(NOW()) + 5) % 7) DAY, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') GROUP BY category ORDER BY cnt DESC;
